gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Determine release version and scope
goals.objective: Inspect package metadata, changelog/release notes history, current repository changes, and recent commits/PR evidence to decide whether this is 0.18.13 or 0.19.0, and define the release scope.
goals.evidence: Selected 0.18.13 as the release version. Evidence: package metadata remains 0.18.12, latest released tag is v0.18.12, post-release dev delta contains compatibility-preserving fixes/CI/docs/dependency bumps/additive session/setup/geobench work, no breaking package/bin/engine/schema or removed active command was found, open issue inventory is empty, and open PRs are fix/docs/warning/safety scoped. QA/red-team subagent 1-ReleaseScopeQa and architect review subagent 2-ReleaseScopeArchitectFast both approve 0.18.13 over 0.19.0.

completionVerification.gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Prepare release artifacts
goals.objective: Update versioned release artifacts for the selected version, including package metadata, changelog, release notes, readiness evidence, and any generated catalogs or mirrored bundles required by repository conventions.
goals.evidence: Prepared 0.18.13 release artifacts: package/package-lock/Cargo/Cargo.lock/plugin metadata are synced to 0.18.13; CHANGELOG, RELEASE_BODY, docs/release-notes-0.18.13.md, and docs/qa/release-readiness-0.18.13.md were created/updated; plugin/catalog generated mirrors were refreshed. Verification logs for build, version sync, native-agent verification, plugin-bundle verification, catalog check, and git diff check are in artifacts/release-0.18.13/logs. QA subagent 4-ReleaseArtifactsQa blocker about missing logs was resolved; architect subagent 3-ReleaseArtifactsReview approved artifacts.

completionVerification.gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Verify and dogfood release candidate
goals.objective: Run the focused and full verification lanes required for release readiness, including dogfooding the built CLI/package surfaces enough to prove the release candidate works.
goals.evidence: Verified and dogfooded the 0.18.13 release candidate. Evidence: npm run test:ci:compiled passed on clean rerun in artifacts/release-0.18.13/logs/test-ci-compiled-rerun.log; focused changed-surface tests passed after fixing session-search test isolation; check:no-unused, npm pack --dry-run, git diff --check, built CLI --version/help with real transcripts and replay artifacts, package version import, and packed install smoke all passed. Doctor dogfood surfaced a user-home hook migration issue documented as environment caveat. Final architect review 8-ReleaseVerificationFinalReview and executor QA 9-ReleaseVerificationFinalQa are clear.

goals.title: Complete safe release handoff
goals.objective: Produce the final release readiness handoff with exact verification evidence and identify the remaining irreversible release command(s) that require maintainer execution or explicit approval.
goals.evidence: Completed the safe 0.18.13 release handoff. docs/qa/release-readiness-0.18.13.md now lists exact local verification evidence, corrected npm pack JSON metrics, full-suite rerun history, and the remaining irreversible/external maintainer actions: PR/push, CI, promotion, approved tag push, tag-triggered GitHub release workflow/native asset manifest, approved npm publication, and post-publication proof capture. Publication remains pending and is not claimed. Executor QA 11-ReleaseHandoffQa found no blockers; architect review 13-ReleaseHandoffReviewCorrected approved the corrected handoff.
